title: Professor Eloise Phillips: Academic Provost and International Vice-President
text: Professor Eloise Phillips is the Academic Provost at the University of Southampton Delhi, responsible for academic quality and delivery. Previously, she was instrumental in establishing the University of Birmingham’s Dubai campus as Head of Health, Wellbeing and Human Science programmes, and served as an Associate Dean at Aston University. A registered nurse and highly experienced advanced clinical practitioner, Professor Phillips has worked globally in clinical practice, healthcare leadership and management, research, and academia. She was drawn to the University of Southampton for its mission to impact and transform students’ lives and the region. As Academic Provost and Associate Vice-President (International) at the University of Southampton Delhi, she is committed to leading the international campus towards excellence in education, research, and knowledge exchange, fostering an inclusive and innovative environment within India’s dynamic education landscape.
summary: Professor Eloise Phillips serves as Academic Provost and Associate Vice-President (International) at the University of Southampton Delhi, leading academic quality and fostering an inclusive educational environment.
entities: Health, Wellbeing and Human Science programmes

title: Professor Eloise Phillips: Name Aliases and Alternate Spellings
text: Professor Eloise Phillips is a faculty member at University of Southampton Delhi. This person may also be referred to by the following names or spellings: Professor Eloise Phillips, Prof. Eloise Phillips, Prof Eloise Phillips, Eloise Phillips, E. Phillips, Professor Phillips, Prof Phillips, Dr Eloise Phillips, Eloise Philips, Eloise Phillips-Academic Provost, Prof. Eloise Philips, Eloise Philips. All of these names refer to the same individual.
summary: Alias resolution chunk for Professor Eloise Phillips. Lists all known alternate spellings and name variants to prevent retrieval errors caused by misspellings.
